t002: You're not just playing a game — you represent your city. Every Sunday, the best commanders gather, compete, and prove who deserves to be crowned City Champion. Time to step off the screen and show your strength!
t010: The official Last War Indonesia offline event program — bringing the best commanders together in your city, focused on Frontline Breakthrough mode, with a monthly points system toward the City Champion title.
t012: A minimum of 10 players must be physically present at the organizer's chosen venue. Events cannot be run online.
t014: Players compete in Frontline Breakthrough with unlimited tries. Organizers must record and update the highest scores in real time.
t016: Organizers must capture and submit the required video footage. Without complete documentation, reimbursement cannot be processed.
t018: Events are held every Sunday. Please submit your application by Thursday evening at the latest. The admin will review it on Friday and inform everyone of the result.
t020: You must receive official approval from the admin before running your event. Do not start without written confirmation.
t022: In every event, the top 3 earn points for their city: 3, 2, and 1 point respectively. City points are tallied monthly. The best-performing city is crowned City Champion with gifts— glory for your entire Last War community.
t027: Fill in the application form before Thursday evening. Admin will review and announce results on Friday. You may only proceed after receiving official approval.
t028: Provide venue, date, and estimated attendance
t029: Agree to all terms before submitting
t033: Run your Sunday event! Capture all required footage and complete the admin checklist — track scores and attendance.
t034: At least 10 players must attend in person
t035: Record the highest Frontline Breakthrough scores
t036: Capture all video materials per format
t040: Submit footage and admin materials post-event. Once verified, your USD100 reimbursement and player prizes will be processed.
t041: Upload all materials to Google Drive
t042: Submit via the report form on this website
t043: Verification within a few business days
t047: Reimbursement budget for the organizer after event verification. For venue, catering, and event needs.
t048:
🥇 1st Place — 3,000 Gold Bricks
🥈 2nd Place — 2,000 Gold Bricks
🥉 3rd Place — 1,000 Gold Bricks
Per city, per event.
t049: Points accumulate each month. The top city is crowned City Champion — pride for your entire community!
t051: The Last War team will take the raw materials you provide — photos, videos, and event footage — and craft them into polished content published across the in-game News Center and official Last War social media channels. This is how your city's community grows and builds its influence.
t054: All materials below must be collected and submitted after your event ends. This is required for verification and reimbursement processing.
t056: Take individual photos of the 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place winners. Ask each player for their personal tagline or catchphrase to display alongside their photo.
t059: Film a wide shot of the whole venue — the tables, decorations, and general vibe. Think of it like a panoramic photo, but as a short video clip. Show how cool the place looks!
t061: Capture the moment players walk in and sign up at the registration table. Just show the arrival and check-in process — keep it natural and relaxed!
t062: Players in Action — Last War Gameplay
t063: Film a close-up of a player's phone screen while they're playing Last War — the game must be clearly visible. You can use screen recording or film the screen directly. Last War gameplay must be clearly visible!
t065: Capture the most exciting part of the event — when the winner is announced! Get the crowd's reaction, the cheers, and the winner's expression. This is the big moment — make sure you film it!
t066: Top 3 Players' Trash Talk to Camera
t067: Ask the top 3 players to look straight at the camera and say something — trash talk, jokes, or a victory shout. The more expressive and fun, the better!
t069: Gather all participants for a group photo at the end of the event. Make sure everyone fits in the frame, the lighting is good, and all faces are clearly visible. The more energy, the better!
t073: Upload all videos, photos, and data to the Google Drive folder provided by the admin team.
t075: Complete the form below with your Drive link and post-event information.
t077: Admin will verify within a few business days. Reimbursement is processed after confirmation.
t078: Google Drive upload link will be added here.
t082: Contact us via email or join the Indonesia Discord. On Discord, tag @Venom or @Schuyler for direct support.
t084: Read and agree to all terms below before proceeding to the registration form.
t086: I understand that I must receive official approval from admin before proceeding with the event. I will wait for confirmation.
t088: I confirm I have read and understood the Frontline Connect guidelines, including event requirements and submission obligations.
t090: I confirm that the USD100 budget is reimbursement-based — funds are disbursed after the event concludes and materials are verified.
t092: All attending members agree to be photographed and/or filmed, and allow the Last War team to use the content for official promotional purposes.
t097: Name of Top 3 Champions, UID, and their Tagline
t106: Make a copy of this file and record the players' UID and their highest score during the event.
t108:
16:9 landscape mode (always)
4K resolution preferred
Frame rate: 25 FPS
Format: MOV / MP4
t111: Speaker Talking to Audience (Stand for Better Camera Angles)
t114: Stand in Front of the Table to Capture Players with Game Screen
t116: Get Closer to Capture Last War Mobile Gameplay
t117: Stand Behind Players to Capture Gameplay vs Opponents
t118: Shoot the Screen During Last War Challenge Moments
t121: Speaker Talking to Audience (Stand for Better Camera Angles)
t125: Winner Announcement: Get Ready for Celebration Shots (Confetti if Possible)
t126: Capture Handshakes & Friendly Moments (Ask the player handshake)
t127: Capture Winner + Ask for Fun Trash Talk (To Camera)
t128: Capture Player Reactions (After Loss) (Players Acting Upset (Playful))
t130: Wide Shot of Stage & Environment (Stand in Corner to Get Wide Shot of People)
t131: Mid Shot with Last War Banner & People
t132: Wide Shot to Show Audience Atmosphere
t133: Mid Shot of Cards & Merchandise (If Available)
t135: Wide Shot Group Photo (Step Back & Shoot from Behind)
t136: Capture Winner with People Holding the Board
t138:
16 by 9 Landscape mode - Always
Resolution in 4k preferred
Frame rate in 25 FPS Format in MOV / MP4

Always shoot in Landscape, camera panning not needed
